title: Vanilla+
description: The Vanilla experience with some performance tweaks and aesthetic decisions!
body: **Vanilla+** is a lightweight modpack that enhances the classic Minecraft vanilla experience with subtle tweaks and quality-of-life improvements. It doesn't add any kind of content and instead is akin to one of the many performance modpacks you can find which simply tweaks a few UI and aesthetic aspects while also including performance optimizing mods.
